channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cars parking on bend, 15th May
item.description:
Cars are continually parking on the bends in this road making it very difficult for drivers to see approaching traffic. Also makes it difficult for pedestrians to cross.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back. Completed by inspector at time of visit. 3mtrs Give and take TM Junction with Village Road (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped 2 large canisters of nitrous oxide at the top of Cudnall St Charlton Kings - see position on attached photos, 15th May
item.description:
These canisters have been left on the pavement for over 2 weeks. I assume they are a hazard and need removing for specialist recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary 00mtrs Give and take with Footway Closure TM Outside number 29 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been parked for 8 weeks no one has attrnded at all. Back window open., 15th May
item.description:
Outside number 9 Summers Road Winchcombe GL54 5YW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Summers Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent abandoned voi scooter blocking drives. Inappropriate and careless parking. Please report to voi, 15th May
item.description:
Outside flats on Withuholt Court
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pinetrees, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 15th May
item.description:
Reset to level gully grate and frame 450mm x 400mm x 100mm Stop and go TM ///loads.demand.cult (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree resting on the post adjacent to the gate. The post has moved and the tree is in danger of falling on someone passing through the gate., 15th May
item.description:
The problem is at the top of the public footpath at the gate from the field into the woods on the public footpath adjacent to Woodbine Cottage, Main Road, Shurdington.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gwinnett Court, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 15th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 800mm x 300mm x 50mm approx unable to measure or mark due to parked car Stop and go TM Outside Bottomley Cottage (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass not being cut , it has been less than 10yds away, 15th May
item.description:
The grass verges get cut on voxwell lane , your colleagues can see the verge in the highgrove and always leave it , could you please arrange to get this cut . Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, The Highgrove, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
///loaded.aura.trials

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Stanway Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.description:
CW Pothole 500mm x 400mm x 42mm 2 x NSD Stop and go TM Junction with Mill Lane (CW10 Pothole)

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 15th May
item.description:
Tree on grass verge is dead and dropping branches
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 14th May
item.description:
Opposite entrance to construction site, just after turning to school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous deep potholes, 14th May
item.description:
By the ongoing construction site. Impossible to avoid as the road is already narrowed by the construction. Please could they be fixed urgently as are dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on bend, 14th May
item.description:
Cars are constantly parking on this bend making it very difficult to see if any vehicles are coming in either direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Westfield Avenue, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing traffic lights for cars at Brewery, 14th May
item.description:
I hope you are well! I’m getting in contact about the traffic lights outside the brewery. I’m not sure what’s going on whether it’s a timing issue with the lights that aren’t in sync or whether there is just a missing light at the crossing shown in the photo above but when driving down the road towards Tewksbury there are no traffic lights at this crossing for the driver so there is no way to know whether it is the pedestrians right of way or the driver’s right of way. Thanks so much and please could this be looked into when possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Margaret's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Lights are red for no reason
